# CMSampleBuffer.DataReadiness.failed(_:)

**Case**

The system failed to load the media data.

## Declaration

```swift
case failed(OSStatus)
```

## Parameters

- **status**: An `OSStatus` value that indicates the cause of the failure.

## States

- **CMSampleBuffer.DataReadiness.notReady**: The media data isn’t ready to use.
- **CMSampleBuffer.DataReadiness.ready**: The media data is ready to use.
